use_cases: Toggle between two text states with a smooth 3D flip animation
Interactive button with hover and tap feedback effects
State-switching UI element for settings or mode toggles
Animated call-to-action button with visual state changes
ai_summary: A sleek flip button component that toggles between two text states using a 3D rotateX animation with spring physics. Features hover scaling, tap feedback, and smooth state transitions. The pill-shaped button uses color inversion between states (blue/white to gray/black) for clear visual distinction.
